architecture.paradigm: layered: Context tier (React) → Lib tier (pure TS) → Data tier (localStorage + IDB)
architecture.key_constraint: MarmotClient signer is constructor-only — signer mode switch requires full MarmotContext re-init via the existing privateKeyHex effect dependency

seams.identity: NostrIdentityContext owns pubkeyHex, npub, signerMode, backedUp. Must be extended to hold mode ('local'|'nip46'|'nip07') in state + lp_signerMode_v1. In non-local mode holds no privateKeyHex.
seams.ndk_signer: ndkClient.ts:applySigner() currently private, hex-only. Must be extended to accept NDKNip46Signer | NDKNip07Signer | hex string. Or new applyNdkSigner(signer: NDKSigner) overload.
seams.marmot_signer: signerAdapter.ts:createPrivateKeySigner(hex) returns EventSigner for marmot. New factories needed: createNip46EventSigner(ndkNip46) and createNip07EventSigner(ndkNip07). Both must expose .nip44 = { encrypt, decrypt } using pubkey-hex args.
seams.relay_list: New getEffectiveRelays() helper reads lp_relays_v1 from localStorage, falls back to DEFAULT_RELAYS. All 7+ MarmotContext + 3 NdkNetworkAdapter + 4 relayBackup DEFAULT_RELAYS usages route through this helper.

files_to_modify: app/src/types/index.ts — add lp_relays_v1, lp_signerMode_v1, lp_nip46Session_v1 to STORAGE_KEYS
app/src/lib/ndkClient.ts — add applyNdkSigner(signer) alongside existing applySigner(hex)
app/src/context/MarmotContext.tsx — route DEFAULT_RELAYS → getEffectiveRelays(); extend init effect to watch signerMode
app/src/lib/i18n.ts — add advanced sub-key with en+de strings

story_sequence.title: Foundation: storage keys, relay helper, Advanced section shell
Relay management UI + live pool apply
Identity/signing split: signer mode state + local-key gating
E2E tests + i18n completeness + npub-only verification

ndk_adapter_pattern.nip46: createNip46EventSigner(signer: NDKNip46Signer): EventSigner → getPublicKey() delegates to signer.user.hexpubkey(); signEvent(draft) calls signer.sign(event); nip44.encrypt(pubkey, text) calls signer.encrypt(ndk.getUser({pubkey}), text, 'nip44'); nip44.decrypt mirrors encrypt
ndk_adapter_pattern.nip07: createNip07EventSigner(signer: NDKNip07Signer): EventSigner → same shape; nip44.encrypt/decrypt delegates to window.nostr.nip44.encrypt/decrypt with hex pubkey args (window.nostr checked null-safe)
ndk_adapter_pattern.why: applesauce-core EventSigner.nip44 expects (pubkeyHex: string, plaintext: string) => Promise<string>. NDK signers use NDKUser objects — translation required in both adapters.

relay_update_strategy.ndk_pool: ndk.pool.addRelay(url, true) for new relays; ndk.pool.removeRelay(url) for removed. Also update ndk.explicitRelayUrls. Do NOT recreate NDK singleton.
relay_update_strategy.marmot: No marmot relay change needed — existing groups' relays are frozen. Only getEffectiveRelays() is swapped so future group creation uses the new list.

dual_seam_atomicity.mechanism: MarmotContext init() effect already rebuilds MarmotClient when privateKeyHex changes. Adding signerMode to the effect's dependency array causes it to re-run on mode change. The effect sets ndk.signer AND constructs the marmot EventSigner in the same synchronous pass before any UI unblocks. This guarantees AC-SIGNER-10 without extra locking.
dual_seam_atomicity.risk: The effect runs asynchronously (async init()). During re-init, the UI must show a 'switching signer…' loading state that blocks all publish paths.
